calendar.matters:
Verified Petition For Order Approving Settlement Pursuant To Probate Code Section 17200
Off Calendar Feb-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Stein for Robert Schofield, Trustee.
Ciaran O'Sullivan for Bryan Foster, Beneficiary.
David F. Monsour for Raymond Russell.
Timothy Chambers for Michael Russell, Jr.

The court acknowledged reviewing the petition and the settlement agreement. Counsel confirmed that the settlement terms are acceptable to all parties. The court took the petition under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Verified Petition For Order Approving Settlement Pursuant To Probate Code Section 17200
Off Calendar Dec-31-2024 Continued To Feb-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition (1) To Suspend Trustee Of Russell Survivor'S Trust; (2) To Remove Trustee; (3) To Surcharge Trustee; (4) To Enjoin Trustee From Using Trust Funds To Defend This Action; And (5) To Disqualify Respondent'S Law Firm
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-06-2024 Vacated

Petition (1) To Suspend Trustee Of Russell Survivor'S Trust; (2) To Remove Trustee; (3) To Surcharge Trustee; (4) To Enjoin Trustee From Using Trust Funds To Defend This Action; And (5) To Disqualify Respondent'S Law Firm
Off Calendar Oct-22-2024 Continued To Dec-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition (1) To Suspend Trustee Of Russell Survivor'S Trust; (2) To Remove Trustee; (3) To Surcharge Trustee; (4) To Enjoin Trustee From Using Trust Funds To Defend This Action; And (5) To Disqualify Respondent'S Law Firm
Off Calendar Aug-21-2024 Continued To Oct-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition (1) To Suspend Trustee Of Russell Survivor'S Trust; (2) To Remove Trustee; (3) To Surcharge Trustee; (4) To Enjoin Trustee From Using Trust Funds To Defend This Action; And (5) To Disqualify Respondent'S Law Firm
Off Calendar Jul-16-2024 Continued To Aug-21-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For (1) Instructions To Trustee, (2) To Enjoin Sale Of Trust Property Pending, And (3) For A Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar May-14-2024 Continued To Nov-12-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ciarin O'Sullivan for Bryan Foster (Petitioner).
John Stein for and with Robert Schofield (trustee).
Kevin Rodriguez appeared by zoom for and with Raymond Russell (respondent) in person.
Tim Chambers appeared by zoom for and with Michael Russell (respondent) in person.

Discussion was held regarding mediation being set for June 6, 2024, whether it makes sense to set the matter for trial now or wait until after mediation, the possibility of the court issuing a Breslin order, Mr. O'Osullivan's intent to file a petition to remove the trustee, the notice issue regarding all vested or contingent beneficiaries, the conflict of the having the same trustee in the two trusts that are in litigation, the trustee having lent money from one trust to the beneficiaries of the other trust, etc. The Petition for Instructions to Trustee, etc. is set for trial in the Department of the Presiding Judge (206) on November 12, 2024 at 9:30 a.m., (order for the same signed in open court/a copy of the order and notice of trial was provided to Mr. O'Sullivan and Mr. Stein in open Court). Mr. Chambers and Mr. Rodriguez are to obtain a copy of the order from the court's website.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition For (1) Instructions To Trustee, (2) To Enjoin Sale Of Trust Property Pending, And (3) For A Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Feb-07-2024 Continued To May-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Ciaran O'Sullivan, Esq., in court, for Bryan Foster, Petitioner.

John Stein, Esq., in court, for Robert Schofield, Respondent.

David Monsour, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for and with Raymond Russell, in court, Respondent.

Timothy J. Chambers, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for Michael Russell, Jr., Respondent.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the instant petition. The court and counsel discuss the pending mediation and the request to continue this matter to a date after the mediation. There is a request to set a trial date six months from today. The preceding issue is discussed. The court believes that this matter is not ready to be set for trial at this time. After additional discussion, the court advises that it intends to continue this matter, issue a Case Management Order, and will consider setting a trial date at the next calling.

The subject matter is continued to May-14-2024 at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Hon. Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Petition For (1) Instructions To Trustee, (2) To Enjoin Sale Of Trust Property Pending, And (3) For A Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Nov-28-2023 Continued To Jan-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Ciarin O'sullivan appeared in person for Bryan Foster (Petitioner).
John Stein appeared in person for and with Robert Schofield (respondent).
David Monsour appeared in person for and with Raymond Russell (respondent).

Discussion was held regarding signing up for pro-bono mediation, that parties didn't all agree to mediation, that petitioner Bryan Foster has the right to occupy the property on 906 Guerrero Street, and that parties would like to see the properties sell as soon as possible. The Court would like all parties to meet and confer informally. Petition for (1) instructions to trustee, etc., is continued to January 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by January 02, 2024.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cabrera. Not reported.
